paragraphs: This paper studies model accuracy on a benchmark dataset.
We compare retrieval settings and analyze evidence distribution.
Our method uses bridge expansion with adjacency and entity overlap.
Section continuity is included as a binary signal.

evidence: Section continuity is included as a binary signal.

paragraphs: Adjacency-only expansion can add noisy neighbors.
Bridge scoring helps prioritize relevant nearby context.

evidence: Adjacency-only expansion can add noisy neighbors.
